en.title: FUD FAQ | A Weekly Community Thread | Week 70

blocks.value: FUD FAQ | A Weekly Community Thread | Week 70

There is already a tremendous amount of work done daily by a culture, of knowhow and skills shared, of buying activity that stops at nothing when some other culture stands in the way, or when market upheaval or local obstacles stand in their way actively trying to stop them from engaging in existing expression, consumption, creativity and style…This culture comes up directly from the streets from lived experience and doesn’t take no lightly. Instructables respond directly to that existing deep and rich cultural history, of taking it on ourselves to build freely out in the open with the best tools, materials and skills we insist on making the most use of. No matter how little some people might believe that we can. It is in the history of every step of the advancement of manufacturing. From textiles, throughout the industrial revolution into our technological age. And now, even the materials that we wear, the paper that we print to, and the digital icons that we hold in our wallets reinforce that opening of institutions and markets.
Instructables show how to use web3, NFTs, cc0 and every other advanced tool of personal ownership and self sovereignty in every bit of code and collection sold along the way.
Broken record question of the week; WTF is wrong with Yuga Labs and when is it going to all come crashing down?

How much more do people need to see before they get that the Yuga Lab’s founders really are alt-right wannabe Nazi symps? It’s getting pretty impossible to ignore at this point and it’s funny how the only people really defending them are those trying to protect their bags or refuse in all cases to accept the reality that we live in.
Couldn’t have said it better ourselves.
It’s really not punk, it’s just boring.

As if the Bitcoin maxis fud couldn’t get any worse there was a parade of clowns yesterday saying some nonsense about whether Coinbase is an L1 and if you’re “not only sticking to Bitcoin & Lightning then you’re not ethical”.
I wonder what opaque money games they are playing 🧐 Cause they clearly don’t know the tech.
If you would like a question answered or contribute content to next weeks article please reach out through our DIGITALAX Discord server in #FUD-FAQ channel!

ar.title: FUD FAQ | ثريد مجتمعي اسبوعي | اسبوع 70

blocks.value: FUD FAQ | ثريد مجتمعي اسبوعي | اسبوع 70

There is already a tremendous amount من work done daily by a culture, من knowhow و skills shared, من buying activity that stops at nothing when some other culture stands في ال way, or when market upheaval or local obstacles stand في their way actively trying الى stop them من engaging في existing expression, consumption, creativity و style…This culture comes up directly من ال streets من lived experience و doesn’t take no lightly. Instructables respond directly الى that existing deep و rich cultural history, من taking it على ourselves الى build freely out في ال open مع ال best tools, materials و skills we insist على making ال most use من. No matter ازاي little some people might believe that we can. It is في ال history من every step من ال advancement من manufacturing. من textiles, throughout ال industrial revolution into our technological age. و now, even ال materials that we wear, ال paper that we print الى, و ال ديجيتال icons that we hold في our wallets reinforce that opening من institutions و markets.
Instructables show ازاي الى use web3, NFTs, cc0 و every other advanced tool من personal ownership و self sovereignty في every bit من code و collection sold along ال way.
Broken record سؤال من ال اسبوع; WTF is wrong مع Yuga Labs و when is it going الى all come crashing down?

ازاي much more do people need الى see before they get that ال Yuga Lab’s founders really are alt-right wannabe Nazi symps? It’s getting pretty impossible الى ignore at this point و it’s funny ازاي ال only people really defending them are those trying الى protect their bags or refuse في all cases الى accept ال reality that we live في.
إحنا نفسنا ما كنّاش هنقولها أحسن من كده.
دي مش بانك خالص، دي بس مملة.

As if ال Bitcoin maxis fud couldn’t get any worse there was a parade من clowns yesterday saying some nonsense about whether Coinbase is an L1 و if you’re “not only sticking الى Bitcoin & Lightning then you’re not ethical”.
I wonder what opaque money games they are playing 🧐 Cause they clearly don’t know ال tech.
شوف كل FUD FAQ من هنا.
